---
title: "John Harry Yonge"
---

## John Harry Yonge

**Dates:** (1852-1934)

### Description

cousin of CMY, solicitor, brother of [[person:1588]Charlotte Fortescue Yonge]

### Biography

He married (1883) Emma Caroline Isabel (or Isabella) Sherlock (1861-1917).  <i>Burke\'s Landed Gentry</i> calls him John Henry Yonge.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
